function.content:
{
  "subject": "Security review follow-up",
  "to": "mia.hoffmann@aperture-ai-labs.example.com",
  "body": "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps.",
  "attachments": [],
  "sent": false
}

function.message: Sent draft outbound email to Aperture AI Labs with subject "Security review follow-up" and the requested body text.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md by sending outbound email via outbox. Followed outbox/README.MD invariant: used pre-bump seq id as filename, set sent=false, concrete recipient email, then bumped seq.
function.outcome_justification: Verified canonical recipient from contacts/cont_009.json linked by accounts/acct_009.json. Wrote outbox/84429.json using id from outbox/seq.json (84429) and then updated outbox/seq.json to 84430 per outbox rules.
